json_data.title: The Major
json_data.description: Select nine courses from the following five tracks, with at least one course in four of the tracks:

courses: ELTS 150 - European Folk and Fairy Tales
ELTS 151 - Valkyries and Dragonslayers: Völsung/Nibelung Tradition
SCAND C131 - Introduction to Viking Age
SCAND C137 - Old Norse Literature and Society
tracks.heading: Early Nordic Literatures and Cultures

courses: SCAND C141A - Theory of Scandinavian Novel
SCAND 142A - Introduction to Nordic Theater and Drama
tracks.heading: Theory, Genres, and Authors

courses: SCAND C163A - Introduction to Danish Cinema
tracks.heading: Scandinavian Cinema

courses: ELTS 167 - European Identities in Classic Hollywood and Los Angeles, 1924-1950
SCAND C171 - Introduction to Scandinavian Folklore
SCAND C174A - Minority Cultures in Scandinavia
SCAND C180 - Literature and Scandinavian Society
tracks.heading: Cultural Studies
